name: ai_marketing_claude_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_claude capability.

prompts.name: website_audit
prompts.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and provide a detailed marketing analysis with recommendations.
prompts.use_case: Marketing teams looking to automate website audits and receive actionable recommendations.

prompts.name: generate_marketing_copy
prompts.template: Generate persuasive marketing copy for a business described as: {business_info} targeting {target_audience} with goals {marketing_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Businesses needing AI-generated marketing copy and email sequences for campaigns.

prompts.name: create_email_sequence
prompts.template: Create an email sequence for a campaign with parameters: {campaign_parameters} aimed at {marketing_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Agencies preparing competitive intelligence and client-ready marketing reports quickly.

prompts.name: plan_ad_campaign
prompts.template: Design an ad campaign strategy based on the business: {business_info}, targeting {target_audience} with goals: {marketing_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Content managers requiring content calendars generated based on marketing strategies.

prompts.name: generate_content_calendar
prompts.template: Generate a content calendar for marketing activities over the period defined in {campaign_parameters}.
prompts.use_case: Advertisers wanting AI-assisted ad campaign planning and execution support.

prompts.name: competitive_intelligence
prompts.template: Analyze competitor data from: {competitive_data} and provide a comparative intelligence report.

prompts.name: compile_client_report
prompts.template: Compile all marketing findings and generated materials into a professional client-ready PDF report.
